inputs.label: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: The density of the fluid through which the object moves. For air at sea level and 15°C, use 1.225 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: The density of the fluid through which the object moves. For air at sea level and 15°C, use 1.225 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin içinde hareket ettiği akışkanın yoğunluğu. Deniz seviyesinde ve 15°C'de hava için 1,225 kg/m³ kullanın.

inputs.label: Flow Velocity (v)
inputs.businessContext: Relative velocity between the object and the fluid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative velocity between the object and the fluid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesne ile akışkan arasındaki bağıl hız.

inputs.label: Drag Coefficient (Cd)
inputs.businessContext: Empirical coefficient that depends on the shape of the object. Typical values: smooth sphere 0.47, streamlined body 0.04, cube 1.05.

businessContext_i18n.en: Empirical coefficient that depends on the shape of the object. Typical values: smooth sphere 0.47, streamlined body 0.04, cube 1.05.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin şekline bağlı ampirik katsayı. Tipik değerler: düzgün küre 0,47, aerodinamik gövde 0,04, küp 1,05.

inputs.label: Reference Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: The frontal area of the object perpendicular to the flow, or other appropriate reference area.

businessContext_i18n.en: The frontal area of the object perpendicular to the flow, or other appropriate reference area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin akışa dik ön alanı veya uygun başka bir referans alanı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
